personal.name: Alex Mercer
personal.title: Full Stack Developer & Creative Engineer
personal.bio: I build digital experiences that live at the intersection of code and creativity. With 5+ years of crafting scalable web applications, I turn complex problems into elegant, user-centric solutions. When I'm not debugging production issues at 2 AM, I'm exploring generative art and open-source tooling.

projects.title: NeuralHub
projects.description: A collaborative ML model repository with real-time training dashboards, version control for datasets, and one-click deployment pipelines to major cloud providers.

projects.title: FlowBoard
projects.description: Real-time Kanban and sprint planning tool with AI-powered task prioritization, burndown analytics, and Slack/GitHub integrations used by 500+ teams.

projects.title: EchoAPI
projects.description: An open-source API mocking and testing platform supporting REST, GraphQL, and gRPC with a visual contract editor and CI/CD webhook triggers.

projects.title: Luminary CMS
projects.description: Headless CMS with a visual block editor, multi-language support, and an edge-cached delivery layer that serves 50M+ content requests per month.
projects.name: Jordan Mitchell
projects.title: Full-Stack Developer & Creative Technologist
projects.bio: I build immersive, high-performance web experiences that blend cutting-edge technology with thoughtful design. Passionate about pushing the boundaries of what's possible in the browser — from 3D worlds to buttery-smooth animations.

projects.title: Nebula Dashboard
projects.description: A real-time analytics dashboard with 3D data visualizations, interactive charts, and a stunning dark-mode UI. Built for enterprise clients who need beautiful data storytelling.

projects.title: Soundscape
projects.description: An immersive audio visualization experience powered by WebGL. Users upload music and watch generative art unfold in real-time, synchronized to the beat.

projects.title: EcoTrack
projects.description: A sustainability tracking app that gamifies eco-friendly habits. Features include carbon footprint calculators, community challenges, and reward systems.

projects.title: PixelForge
projects.description: A browser-based pixel art editor with real-time collaboration. Multiple users can draw on the same canvas simultaneously with WebSocket sync.

projects.title: DevFlow
projects.description: A developer productivity tool that combines task management, code snippets, and AI-powered documentation into a single sleek interface.

projects.title: Wanderlust
projects.description: An interactive travel blog with map-based navigation. Each destination features a parallax photo story with embedded videos and local recommendations.

experience.description: Lead a cross-functional team of 8 engineers building a B2B SaaS analytics platform. Reduced API response times by 60% through query optimization and Redis caching. Introduced TypeScript across the entire frontend codebase, cutting production bugs by 35%.

Built and maintained React micro-frontends serving 2M+ monthly active users. Architected the real-time notification system using WebSockets and BullMQ. Mentored 4 junior engineers on code quality and system design principles.

Developed responsive marketing sites and e-commerce storefronts for 20+ clients. Integrated third-party payment gateways and shipping APIs. Improved Core Web Vitals scores by an average of 40 points across client sites.
Leading a team of 5 engineers building the next-gen analytics platform. Shipped 3D data visualization features that increased user engagement by 40%.
Designed and developed award-winning interactive web experiences for global brands including Nike, Spotify, and Adobe.
Built MVPs for 8 early-stage startups. Specialized in rapid prototyping and going from zero to launch in under 6 weeks.

education.description: Focused on Human-Computer Interaction and Computer Graphics. Dean's List all 4 years.

testimonials.name: Sarah Chen
testimonials.text: Alex is the rare engineer who can architect a system at 9 AM and ship a pixel-perfect UI by 5 PM. Their technical depth combined with product empathy makes them invaluable on any team.

testimonials.name: Marcus Rivera
testimonials.text: Working with Alex elevated our entire team. They brought structure to our chaotic codebase, introduced testing culture, and always found time to mentor others without sacrificing velocity.

testimonials.name: Priya Nair
testimonials.text: Alex translates ambiguous product requirements into clean, maintainable code better than anyone I've worked with. Clients consistently praised the quality and speed of their deliveries.

stats.name: Sarah Chen
stats.text: Jordan is the rare engineer who combines deep technical skills with an incredible design sensibility. Every project they touch becomes visually stunning AND performant.

stats.name: Marcus Rodriguez
stats.text: I've worked with hundreds of developers, and Jordan stands out. They shipped our entire platform in 4 weeks — and it looked like it was designed by a world-class agency.

stats.name: Emily Nakamura
stats.text: Jordan doesn't just write code — they craft experiences. Their ability to translate complex creative visions into interactive reality is unmatched.
